prompt: How many planets are in our solar system?
text: There are eight recognized planets in our solar system. They are, in order from the Sun: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune. Additionally, there are dwarf planets, such as Pluto, but they are not classified as one of the main planets.

sentences.text: There are eight recognized planets in our solar system.
